license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7r4hm8w
title: Enzymatic PCR Cleanup Protocol (NEB #M0525)
author: New England   Biolabs

steps_raw.instruction: Add 1 µL of Quick CIP ( NEB #M0525 ) to 5 µL of PCR product. Note that 0.5 μl of Exo I ( NEB #M0293 ) and 1 μl of rSAP ( NEB #M0371 ) can be used in the same volume.
Incubate the mix at the 37 °C for 00:15:00 .
PCR products are ready for downstream application.
